title: AI schemas
description: Suggestion, suggestion change tracking, and generation job data shapes for the Dialed AI service

dateTime.description: An ISO 8601 date-time string with timezone (e.g. 2026-03-18T12:00:00Z)

Suggestion.description: An AI-generated suspension tuning suggestion for a session. Contains the full reasoning text from Claude plus a list of individual parameter changes to track.

session_id.description: ID of the core.sessions session this suggestion was generated for

user_id.description: ID of the rider who requested this suggestion

suggestion_text.description: Full suggestion text as generated by Claude. Streams to the client via SSE while being written. Contains reasoning, context, and human-readable recommendations.

changes.description: Individual parameter-level changes extracted from the suggestion. Each change is tracked separately for efficacy measurement.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this suggestion was created

SuggestionChange.description: A single parameter change within a suggestion — the junction record between a suggestion and what the rider actually did. Tracks whether the change was applied, skipped, or modified, and captures the outcome lap delta.

suggestion_id.description: ID of the parent suggestion this change belongs to

suggested_value.description: The value Claude recommended for this parameter (e.g. '12', '3 clicks out', '10mm sag')

symptom.description: The handling symptom this change addresses (e.g. 'mid-corner understeer', 'fork diving under braking'). Used in progress analytics.

confidence.description: Confidence score (0–1) from the rules engine for this specific change recommendation

applied_status.description: Whether and how the rider acted on this change. 'applied_modified' means the rider applied a different value than suggested — captured in actual_value.

actual_value.description: The value the rider actually set, if different from suggested_value. Only populated when applied_status is 'applied_modified'.

outcome_lap_delta_ms.description: Lap time change in milliseconds after applying this change. Negative = improvement (faster). Populated after the rider's next session.

applied_at.description: Timestamp when the rider marked this change as applied or skipped. Null if not_applied.

created_at.description: Timestamp when this change record was created

GenerationJob.description: Tracks the state of an async AI suggestion generation job. Created when a suggestion is requested, updated as the worker calls Claude, and streamed to the client via SSE.

id.description: Unique generation job identifier, also used to construct the SSE stream URL

session_id.description: ID of the session a suggestion is being generated for

status.description: Current job state. 'pending' = queued in Redis; 'processing' = worker is building prompt; 'streaming' = Claude is generating (SSE is active); 'complete' = suggestion saved; 'failed' = unrecoverable error.

error_message.description: Human-readable error description if status is 'failed'

created_at.description: Timestamp when this generation job was created

completed_at.description: Timestamp when this job reached 'complete' or 'failed' status
